hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if os.path.basename(fp)=='.env' else 0)"

python3 -c "import sys,json,os,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); fp.endswith('.md') and os.path.exists(fp) and subprocess.run(['markdownlint','--config','.markdownlint.json',fp])"
